data.value: Rounding Time must be between From and To

data.value: This timetable is in use, are you sure to delete it?

data.value: This position has been already used.

data.value: Timetable should not have same time.

data.value: Server address is invalid, please input again.

data.value: Port value must be between 1 and 65535

data.name: InvalidMaxOpe
data.value: Max Buffer must input a value

data.value: Please make sure that the port:{0} is not being used !

data.value: Alphabets Or Numbers starting with 0 are not supported in Access Function
